overall.description: First-person gameplay footage moving through a lush alien canyon river environment, likely from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora. The player transitions from swimming in the river to walking along the rocky shoreline, passing waterfalls and towering rock spires while encountering small blue humanoid creatures.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien canyon river with misty atmosphere

events.description: waterfall comes into view on the right side of the canyon
begins transitioning from swimming to wading as water depth decreases

agents.ego_description: swimming and wading through the river canyon, approaching the rocky shoreline

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in moss and vegetation
tall rock formation rising from the water's edge
clear greenish water with gentle current
towering rock formations visible through the mist in the distance
white cascading waterfall flowing down the canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving through a misty alien canyon river. Steep canyon walls flank both sides while towering rock spires loom in the distance. A waterfall becomes visible on the right around 6 seconds, then recedes into the background as the camera advances through the water toward the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with dense jungle vegetation

events.description: exits the water completely onto the rocky shoreline
small blue humanoid creatures become visible on the shore ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky riverbank, observing the canyon walls and distant rock formations

entered.detail: moss-covered rocks and pebbles along the water's edge
thick vines hanging from trees spanning the canyon

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the water onto a rocky shoreline covered in moss and small plants. The perspective shifts to walking along the riverbank, with the water now to the right. Large hanging vines become visible spanning the canyon overhead, and small blue humanoid creatures appear in the distance ahead around the 28-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky trail under dense canopy

events.description: begins ascending slightly up the rocky slope away from the water
passes under large overhanging tree branches that partially obscure the sky

agents.ego_description: navigating the rocky uphill trail, passing small blue creatures and observing the alien flora

notable_agents.action: small blue humanoid creatures walking along the shore in the same direction

entered.detail: small humanoid figures with blue skin, possibly Na'vi children or similar alien beings
bioluminescent purple fern-like vegetation growing on the rocks
massive tree with thick branches extending across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a narrow rocky trail ascending slightly away from the river. Small blue humanoid creatures are visible walking ahead on the path. The environment becomes more enclosed as large tree branches form a partial canopy overhead. Alien purple plants dot the rocky terrain, and the canyon walls close in on both sides as the trail continues deeper into the jungle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins in a misty river and transitions into a dense, enclosed alien jungle. It begins by gliding through a canyon river flanked by steep walls and towering spires, passing a waterfall on the right before advancing toward the bank. As the camera exits the water, the perspective shifts to walking along a mossy shoreline where large hanging vines span the canyon overhead and small blue humanoid creatures appear in the distance. The scene then opens onto a narrow rocky trail that ascends away from the river, following the creatures deeper into the terrain. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as alien purple plants dot the ground and large tree branches form a canopy, with the canyon walls closing in as the path leads further into the jungle.
